name: Utopia Default
summary: The first locked Utopia Studio theme. It maps the core semantic contract to the APFEL-derived Utopia Studio brand system.

geometry.elevation: hairline borders and background shifts; no brand-surface drop shadows

allow: solid Special Black, Light Grey, Brick Red, and White surfaces

iconPolicy.description: Icons are brand marks made from solid dots and rectangular bars. They are graphic breaks, not decoration.
allow: monochrome Special Black or current foreground
iconPolicy.coreNote: This restriction belongs to Utopia Default only. Other themes may declare different icon systems.

aiRules: Read this theme policy after the core semantic contract.
Do not apply Utopia brand restrictions to other themes unless their manifests say so.
Do not hardcode Brick Red, Special Black, TWK Lausanne, or Utopia icon rules inside reusable core components.
When Arabic or lang="ar" content is present, use --font-arabic mapped to IBM Plex Sans Arabic and the Arabic line-height role.
When this theme is active, do not use Lucide icons as brand-facing component icons.
